name: morning_wakeup_skipped_away_occupancy
description: Away mode with bedtime setback already active. Wakeup event fires at 07:00 while occupancy=away. In production, wakeup is skipped when away. The simulator currently restores comfort on wakeup regardless of occupancy â€” assertion is simulator_support:false pending wakeup occupancy guard.
notes: Production behavior: handle_morning_wakeup() checks occupancy â€” if away/vacation, skip restore.
Simulator current behavior: _handle_wakeup() does not check occupancy; always calls comfort_restored.
This scenario uses simulator_support:false on the skip assertion until the wakeup occupancy guard
The bedtime setback assertion IS logic-track (simulator applies it correctly).
Covers Priority 5 wakeup+away from plan abundant-mapping-clarke.md.

events.note: Previous day classification â€” cool mode at comfort_cool=74F
User leaves â€” away setback applied (setback_cool=79F)
Bedtime fires while away â€” setback applied (cool: 74+3=77F, but away setback is 79F so stays at 79F)
Wakeup fires while still away â€” production skips restore; simulator incorrectly calls comfort_restored

assertions.reason: Away setback: setback_cool=79F applied when user leaves
Wakeup while occupancy=away â€” comfort restore suppressed; setback maintained
assertions.gap: Simulator _handle_wakeup() does not check occupancy; always produces comfort_restored. Needs occupancy guard port from automation.py handle_morning_wakeup().

verdict.summary: Wakeup skipped while away: setback maintained, comfort NOT restored (production only)
verdict.observed_behavior: production: setback_applied (79F) on away; morning_wakeup_skipped at 07:00
verdict.expected_behavior: Morning wakeup respects away mode â€” no comfort restore while user is away
